title: BlackRock Q1 2026 Earnings
desc: World's largest asset manager reports Q1 results. Watch for updates on Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF flows and tokenisation strategy.

title: CLARITY Act — Senate Committee Review
desc: US Senate Banking Committee expected to advance the CLARITY Act, the key crypto regulatory framework bill. High impact for the entire market.

title: FOMC Meeting — Fed Interest Rate Decision
desc: Federal Reserve meets April 28-29. Rate decision on April 29. Markets watching for signals on rate cuts. Lower rates are bullish for risk assets including crypto.

title: Robinhood Q1 2026 Earnings
desc: Key indicator of retail crypto demand. Focus on crypto trading volumes and revenue from digital assets.
